channel.title: CySec Lab @ Yonsei University
channel.description: Recent content on CySec Lab @ Yonsei University

item.description: Director Professor Dokyung Song (Email: dokyungs@yonsei.ac.kr) Academic Appointments Mar 2021 - now Assistant Professor Yonsei University Education Dec 2020 Ph.D. in Computer Science University of California, Irvine Mar 2019 M.S. in Computer Science University of California, Irvine Feb 2014 B.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering Seoul National University Students Looking for students!

Publication Agamotto: Accelerating Kernel Driver Fuzzing with Lightweight Virtual Machine Checkpoints [paper] Dokyung Song, Felicitas Hetzelt, Jonghwan Kim, Brent Byunghoon Kang, Jean-Pierre Seifert, Michael Franz In USENIX Security Symposium (USENIX Security), August 2020. Distributed Heterogeneous N-Variant Execution [paper] Alexios Voulimeneas, Dokyung Song, Fabian Parzefall, Yeoul Na, Per Larsen, Michael Franz, Stijn Volckaert In International Conference on Detection of Intrusions and Malware, and Vulnerability Assessment (DIMVA), June 2020.
